features.description: User can create an order with at least one item
acceptance_criteria: Order appears in database with PENDING status
Validation returns 400 for empty items list
features.notes: Complete - PlaceOrderUseCase with event publishing. POST /api/v1/orders creates order.

features.description: User can list their orders with pagination
acceptance_criteria: Only orders for authenticated user are returned
features.notes: Complete - ListOrdersUseCase with customerId filtering, status filter, pagination, and soft-delete exclusion. GET /api/v1/orders.
Complete - UpdateOrderStatusUseCaseImpl with validated state transitions.

acceptance_criteria: Order is marked as deleted (deletedAt set)
Order no longer appears in list queries
features.notes: Complete - SoftDeleteOrderUseCaseImpl. Orders are excluded from all queries by deletedAt=null filter.

features.description: Workflow engine for order state management (Issue #73)
acceptance_criteria: State machine with 9 states (PENDING through REFUNDED)
REST API endpoints for all state transitions
features.notes: Complete - Java uses Spring StateMachine, Python uses transitions library. See docs/ORDER_STATE_MACHINE_GUIDE.md

features.description: Batch job status tracking for scheduled jobs
acceptance_criteria: Status enum: SCHEDULED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED
features.notes: Complete - See issues #96-#99. Domain layer, JPA repository, service, Spring Batch tasklet, Quartz job, REST API all implemented.

acceptance_criteria: Domain layer has no Spring/JPA annotations
Application layer has no HTTP framework imports
Unit tests for all use cases
POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 200 with access and refresh tokens
GET /api/v1/auth/me returns user profile when authenticated
401 returned for invalid credentials or missing token
JWT filter sets security context from Bearer token
features.notes: Complete - Domain model (User, Email, Password, UserId), ports (UserRepository, PasswordHasher, TokenGenerator, TokenParser), use cases (AuthenticateUserUseCase, RegisterUserUseCase, GetCurrentUserUseCase), infrastructure (JpaUserRepository, BCryptPasswordHasher, JwtTokenGenerator, JwtTokenParser, JwtAuthenticationFilter), REST controller (AuthController), tests (domain + use case + controller).
